faults.issue: 75% of correct matches flagged as LOW confidence
faults.root_cause: Thresholds too aggressive for real-world images
faults.impact: Users won't trust system, manual verification needed

faults.issue: AUTO_ACCEPT threshold (0.75) too high for real-world images
faults.root_cause: Thresholds tuned for perfect DB images, not user photos
faults.fix: Lower to 0.55-0.60 based on empirical data

faults.issue: DINOv2 embeddings inconsistent for watermarked/photographed cards
faults.impact: Same card gets different scores based on photo quality

faults.issue: OCR provides near-zero contribution to identification
faults.root_cause: No spatial awareness - extracts wrong text regions
faults.impact: Wasted computation with 5% weight doing nothing
faults.fix: Either fix region extraction or reduce weight to 0%

faults.issue: ORB matching fails on real-world photo conditions
faults.root_cause: Sensitive to rotation, watermarks, lighting changes
faults.impact: 25% weight component contributes little for user photos
faults.fix: Use more robust features or expand candidate set

faults.impact: Embeddings computed in different spaces, reduces accuracy
faults.fix: Either preprocess ALL images or disable query preprocessing
faults.evidence: Visual scores show high variance (0.77-1.0) for same card type

faults.issue: Geometric verification limited to top 5 visual candidates
faults.scenario: Watermarked cards rank low visually, never get geometric check
faults.fix: Expand geometric verification to top 10-15 candidates
faults.tradeoff: ~2x slower geometric stage, but more robust

bottlenecks.optimization: Parallelize ORB matching or reduce candidate count

improvements.rationale: OCR contributes nothing, redistribute to visual

improvements.fix: Use DINOv2's native rescaling instead of manual upscale

improvements.approach: Detect text overlay regions, mask before embedding
